overview.style_direction: Premium Tech / Dark Mode / Corporate Innovation
overview.primary_goal: Transform the current flat PDF into a polished, high-end document that mirrors the web version's quality using @react-pdf/renderer capabilities.

limitations: No complex CSS filters/gradients (use SVG or simulated opacity)

svg_patterns.name: GridBackground
svg_patterns.description: Subtle dot grid or line grid to add texture to the dark background
svg_patterns.implementation: SVG Pattern with small circles opacity 0.1

svg_patterns.name: TechCorners
svg_patterns.description: Corner accents for cards to give a technical/blueprint feel

svg_patterns.name: GradientLine
svg_patterns.description: Divider line that fades out on ends
svg_patterns.implementation: Rect with linearGradient (if supported) or multiple opacity steps

visual_enhancers.icons: Use simple geometric SVG paths (circles, rectangles, combinations) or standard SVG paths for common icons (Check, Arrow, User).

instructions: Add a subtle large geometric shape (circle outline) in the background with low opacity (0.05) to break the flatness.
Increase spacing between 'HOP.AGENCY' and the main title.
Use a 'Tag' or 'Badge' style for the year '2025'.
Ensure 'Rostelecom' and 'Hop.Agency' have equal visual weight but distinct styling.
Use a 2-column layout with a vertical divider line (opacity 0.2).
Style the bullet points as custom SVG checkmarks in accent color.
Wrap the 'Context' text in a container with a subtle left border (accent color).
Add a decorative under-glow or shapes behind the numbers.
Arrange in a horizontal grid with vertical separators between stats.
Replace solid bars with rounded bars.
Add vertical grid lines for weeks (dashed, opacity 0.1).
Add a 'Current Status' marker if applicable (or just start marker).
Create a 'Pricing Card' in the center, floating.
Highlight the Discount badge with a solid accent background (white text).
Make the final price white and huge.

implementation_plan.step_1: Setup Theme Object: Consolidate all colors/fonts in a single theme object for easy reuse.
implementation_plan.step_2: Create Reusable Primitives: Badge, Card, Divider, SectionHeader, BackgroundPattern.
implementation_plan.step_3: Refactor Slide Layouts: Apply flexbox grids and padding consistency.
implementation_plan.step_4: Apply Visual Polish: Add SVGs for decoration and better typography hierarchy.

principles.pdf_rule: Elements defined later in the document tree render ON TOP of earlier elements. No z-index property.
Use View with flexDirection row/column. No 'grid-template-columns'. Use percentage widths (flex: 1 or width: '33%').
Must register fonts explicitly with Font.register(). Only TTF/WOFF usually supported. No system fonts fallback reliability.
Works similar to web, relative to nearest relative parent. Great for background decorations.

typography_scale.rule: PDF points (pt) are physical units. Screen pixels (px) are relative. Generally, scale down Web px by 0.6-0.7x for PDF pt.

universal_guidelines: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='slide-title'`).
Always check for text overflow. PDF Text doesn't auto-scale.
Use View for layout structure, Text only for leaf nodes.
